remarks: Now more than ever, home is a haven - a place to live, work, relax, and entertain. Privately sited on 1 beautifully landscaped acre in highly sought-after Old Hill, this sophisticated 6,000+ SF home with a brand-new pool offers 6 bedrooms, exceptional living spaces, and breathtaking western sunsets overlooking Earthplace's 62-acre nature sanctuary. A rare blend of privacy, style, and convenience, all within walking distance to town. Designed for both elegant entertaining and comfortable everyday living, the main level features a stunning chef's kitchen with custom cabinetry, pantry, and sun-filled dining area flowing seamlessly into the spacious family room with fireplace - all overlooking the expansive lawns, sparkling pool, and serene natural setting. Formal living and dining rooms provide elegant gathering spaces, while a private office/playroom and guest bedroom with full bath complete the first floor. The luxurious primary serves as a private retreat with sitting area or office, walk-in closet, and spa-inspired bath. Four additional bedrooms, two full baths, and a conveniently located laundry room complete the second level. The top floor offers exceptional bonus space, including a vaulted-ceiling playroom, additional room, and half bath. The lower level provides versatile space featuring a gym, mudroom, and extensive storage. Chic yet welcoming interiors, contemporary amenities, and extraordinary natural surroundings combine to create the ultimate Westport retreat.
